event.description:
**Topic:** Connecting your unstructured data with LLMs

**What we’ll do:**
Have some food/dinner and refreshments. Have three exciting talks about LLMs and unstructured data.

5:30 - 6:00 - Welcome/Networking/Registration
6:00 - 6:20 - Analyzing High Dimensional LLM Data - [Francisco Castillo,](https://www.linkedin.com/in/f-castillo-carrasco/) Data Scientist at [Arize AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/arizeai/)
6:25 - 6:55 - Retrieval Augmented Generation Pipelines with Haystack - [Tuana Celik](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tuanacelik/), Developer Advocate at [deepset](https://www.linkedin.com/company/deepset-ai/)
7:00 - 7:30 - Building LLM Apps at Scale - [Yujian Tang](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yujiantang/), Developer Advocate at [Zilliz](https://www.linkedin.com/company/zilliz/mycompany/)
7:30 - 8:30 - Networking

**Who Should attend:**
Anyone interested in talking and learning about Unstructured Data and LLM Apps.

**When:**
August 10th, 2023
5:30PM - 8:30PM

**Where:**
1974 Union Street, San Francisco, CA 94123

Sponsored by [Zilliz](zilliz.com)
event.title: Unstructured Data in LLMs
